zh.lifeSummary: Jane Stockham於1473年出生在英國爾。她和John Stockham至少有1個女兒。她去世於1525年在英國享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jane Stockham于1473年出生在英国爾。她和John Stockham至少有1个女儿。她去世于1525年在英国享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stockham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Stockham in Witheridge (Devon), from Old English stōd ‘stud, herd of horses’ + cumb ‘valley’.
habitational name from Stockham Marsh in Bremhill (Wiltshire), which may derive from Old English stocc ‘tree trunk, stump’ + hamm ‘water meadow’ or hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain

It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. en.lifeSummary: Jane Stockham was born in 1473, in Cheshire, England. She had at least 1 daughter with John Stockham. She died in 1525, in England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Jane Stockham est née en 1473, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec John Stockham. Elle est décédée en 1525, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Jane Stockham wurde 1473 in Cheshire, England geboren. Sie hatte mit John Stockham mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1525 im Alter von 52 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Jane Stockham è nata il nel 1473 nel Cheshire, England. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con John Stockham. Morì nel 1525, nel England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Jane Stockhamは1473年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた。彼女はJohn Stockhamとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1525年にイギリスで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Stockham(은)는 1473년 영국 체실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 John Stockham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 영국에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jane Stockham nasceu em 1473, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com John Stockham. Ela faleceu em 1525, em Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Jane Stockham родилась в 1473 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от John Stockham. Она умерла в 1525 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Jane Stockham nació en 1473, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con John Stockham. Murió en 1525, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
